summary: Brand-to-Product Mapping feature testing completed successfully. All API endpoints (14/14 passing) work correctly. Frontend displays products on brand pages with correct counts organized by series. All tested brand pages properly show/hide products section based on catalog_products availability.

tests: GET /api/catalog/products?brand_slug=ansuz returns 0 products (correct - no catalog products)
Product images accessible via GET request
/brands/ansuz page correctly hides products section - PASS
Products organized by series (Borresen C/M/T/X Series shown) - PASS
Product cards have images loading correctly - PASS
Clicking product card navigates to /products/{slug} detail page - PASS
Product detail page shows image, breadcrumb, brand, tags - PASS
Products section header shows 'Product Catalog' label - PASS
Products section shows '{Brand} Products' title with count - PASS
'View All in Catalog' button present in products section - PASS
Brands listing page shows 'View Products' links (37 found) - PASS

seed_data_creation: 217 catalog_products with brand_slug field populated via migration script
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand-to-product mapping fully working. Brand detail pages (/brands/{slug}) fetch products via /api/catalog/products?brand_slug={slug}. Products displayed organized by series. Brands without catalog products (ansuz, bang-olufsen) correctly hide products section. All 5 brand pages tested (borresen=18, rotel=10, bowers-wilkins=16, aavik=20, sonos=9).
features_verified: /brands/borresen page shows 18 Borresen products with images organized by series
/brands/rotel page shows 10 Rotel products with images organized by series
/brands/bowers-wilkins page shows 16 B&W products with images
Product cards on brand pages link to /products/{slug} detail pages
Clicking a product card from brand page leads to product detail page with image
'View All in Catalog' button on products section links to /products?brand=...
Brands that don't have catalog products don't show the products section
Products section header shows 'Product Catalog' label and '{Brand} Products' title with count
